message:
test(runtime): raise undo/transaction.rs coverage with new tests (bd-1o6q1)

Add tests for: double rollback idempotency, scope drop with multiple
uncommitted transactions, inner rollback preserving outer, empty inner
commit, execute failure rolling back prior commands, scope execute failure
without transaction, and three-level nesting with buffer verification.
Introduces make_scope_cmd helper for non-pre-executed commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
